JSyn - Java Audio Synthesis

Signal Passed Between Units

  • Internally signals are signed (-1.0 to 1.0 ) or unsigned (0.0 to 2.0) for DSPs.
  • Signal "type" controls conversion in set() method.
    • SIGNAL_TYPE_RAW_SIGNED
    • SIGNAL_TYPE_RAW_UNSIGNED
    • SIGNAL_TYPE_HALF_LIFE
    • SIGNAL_TYPE_OSC_FREQ
    • SIGNAL_TYPE_SAMPLE_RATE
    • SIGNAL_TYPE_SVF_FREQ
  • Set signal type for a port on an adder that is connected to an oscillator frequency.
myAdder.inputB.setSignalType( Synth.SIGNAL_TYPE_OSC_FREQ );
myAdder.inputB.set( 440.0 );
 [TOP]  [PREVIOUS]  [NEXT]
